dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}! Is that what I think it is? Let me see!
dialogueChunks.plotStep: This is even better than I hoped. The quality of this {quest_item} is extraordinary: I can already see three projects I can start with this batch alone. {target_npc} is going to be speechless when they see what I craft from this. The whole settlement will benefit for months.
dialogueChunks.outro: You've earned this reward ten times over. And when my masterpiece is finished, I'll make sure your name is attached to it.

playerResponses.text: Seeing that excitement on your face is reward enough. Craft something amazing.
Glad the materials met your standards. I'll take that reward now.
Happy to help. Make something the settlement will remember.

dialogueChunks.intro: You look like you've been through the wringer, {player_name}. But those sacks on your back tell me it was worth it.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I wasn't sure you'd pull it off. {target_npc} told me the route you took was crawling with dangers, and yet here you are with everything I asked for and then some. This {quest_item} will keep {location} fed through the worst of the cold months. I'm already planning the first batch.
dialogueChunks.outro: Take this with my thanks. And come back when the first loaves are out of the oven: you've earned the best seat at the table.

playerResponses.text: Fresh bread after a long journey? That might be the best reward of all.
Just doing what needed doing. Feed your people well.

dialogueChunks.intro: The commission is complete, {player_name}. And it's all thanks to you.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} picked up the finished piece this morning and couldn't believe the quality. Said it was the finest work they'd ever seen from this forge. Between us, I couldn't have done it without the {quest_item} you brought back. The raw materials from that cache were of a grade I haven't worked with in years. This is the kind of work that builds a reputation.
dialogueChunks.outro: Here: your share of the commission payment. You took the risks, you deserve the lion's share.

playerResponses.text: Helping a craftsperson create their best work? That's a good day.
Excellent work, excellent pay. Pleasure doing business.
If you ever need rare materials again, you know who to call.

dialogueChunks.intro: The trade is done, {player_name}. Everything went through perfectly.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} held up their end of the bargain: the exchange was fair, and the goods you carried back are exactly what we needed. {location} hasn't had supplies this good in a long time. The whole market square is buzzing about the new stock. People are already talking about what this means for the season ahead.
dialogueChunks.outro: You made a dangerous journey look routine. Take this: it's the best we could set aside. You've earned the gratitude of every shop and home in {location}.

playerResponses.text: A thriving market is its own reward. But I'll take the payment too.
Safe travels and fair trades. That's how it should always work.
